title: Sobralia wercklei
taxonomy: Sobralia wercklei is a species of orchid, specifically within the family Orchidaceae. This classification further breaks down to the genus Sobralia, which is a group of terrestrial orchids native to the Americas. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, comprising over 30,000 species. The genus Sobralia is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes many other orchid genera. The species Sobralia wercklei is also sometimes classified as Sobralia leucoxantha or Sobralia wercklei var. leucoxantha due to variations in its classification.

intro: Sobralia wercklei is a type of orchid, specifically a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Sobralia wercklei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
